t_ch: 办公室？空间站给我准备了一个套房，不过我觉得离大家太远，这样太生分了。
t_en: My office? Oh, the station gave me a suite, but I like to stay around here and hang out with everybody.

t_ch: 你平时很忙吗？
t_en: Are you busy most of the time?

t_ch: 还行吧，虽然最近的工作有点多，不过我还算应付得来，问题不大！
t_en: The workload is alright. Been having some crunch time lately, but nothing I can't handle!

t_ch: 我明白了。
t_en: I see.

t_ch: 关于空间站…
t_en: About the space station...

t_ch: 我是空间站的站长，空间站的事情，你问我是最适合不过了。
t_en: You've come to the right person. I'm the lead researcher at the station.

t_ch: 说吧，想知道什么？
t_en: Ask me anything!

t_ch: 科员们现在还好吗？
t_en: How are the researchers doing?

t_ch: 有你们的帮忙，加上医疗科的技术，除了那些不幸离开的…基本上是没什么大碍了。
t_en: Sadly, some didn't make it. But thanks to your help and the effort of the Medical Department, most of them are fine now.

t_ch: 不过我还是有点担心，反物质军团的入侵会给大家留下心理阴影…但这种心理问题，只能私下多加留意了。
t_en: However, I'm still worried that people may be traumatized by the invasion of the Antimatter Legion... I'll have to monitor people's mental health more closely.

t_ch: 黑塔现在回空间站了？
t_en: Has Herta returned to the station?

t_ch: 嗯，严格来说是「上线」了，因为黑塔女士是在远程操纵着人偶。
t_en: Yes, but strictly speaking I'd say she's "online" now. The Madam Herta you see here is a remote-controlled puppet.

t_ch: 你要是有什么事找她，但她又一直不理你…千万别多想，她只是下线了而已。
t_en: Don't be offended if she ignores you when you talk to her. Chances are she's just logged off.

t_ch: 毕竟…她只做自己感兴趣的事，一旦失去兴趣就立刻走人，她就是这个性子。
t_en: After all, she only pursues what interests her and as soon as that interest is lost, she abandons it and moves on.

t_ch: 我明白了。
t_en: I see.

t_ch: 我没什么想问的了。
t_en: I don't have any other questions.

t_ch: 还是不打扰你了。
t_en: I better leave you alone.

t_ch: 嗯好，那我们回头再聊！
t_en: All right, till next time then!

t_ch: 我找到了你的私人物品…
t_en: I found your personal item...

t_ch: 我在那个房间里放了留言条…嘿嘿，上面的内容是我开的玩笑，你别在意。
t_en: I left a note in that room... Hehe. I wrote a joke on it. Don't mind me.

t_ch: 对了，怎么突然聊起这个，你是有什么事想问我吗？
t_en: Oh, by the way, why did you want to talk about that all of a sudden? Is there something you want to ask me about?

t_ch: 可以呀，你想聊些什么？
t_en: Of course. What do you want to talk about?

t_ch: 我有点好奇你家的事…
t_en: I'm curious about your family...

t_ch: 我家？其实也没什么好说的，有点小钱，生活也算是富足…也就这样了，没什么特殊的地方。
t_en: My family? Nothing too crazy. They made a fortune and stayed relatively well-off. That's about it.

t_ch: 空间站里可以网购吗？
t_en: Can you order stuff online at the station?

t_ch: 当然可以！你算是问对人啦，整个空间站里至少八成的包裹是我的……
t_en: Of course! You are asking the expert. Of every <unbreak>10</unbreak> parcels delivered here, 8 are mine...

t_ch: 「公司」旗下的平台很多，我个人推荐「寰宇佳品」，他们家的服务态度特别好。
t_en: The IPC owns a lot of platforms. My personal recommendation would be Cosmo Premium. They have good customer service.

t_ch: 不过…军团入侵导致配送有些困难，要么就不发货，要么就丢件，哎……
t_en: However, the Legion's invasion has made delivery difficult. It's either "we've received your order" and it stays that way forever, or they lose your parcel on its way here. So annoying...

t_ch: 现在很流行「爆炸头」发型吗？
t_en: Is it trendy to get such a luscious hairstyle?

t_ch: …哈哈！你还真信啊！肯定是那个顶着「爆炸头」发型的家伙在忽悠你。
t_en: Haha! Where did you hear that from? The guy with that luscious hairstyle is probably the one who tricked you into believing this.

t_ch: 其实是他们之前围绕着某个奇物在做实验，但实验出了一些偏差，在场所有人的头发都遭了殃……
t_en: Truth is, a group of researchers was experimenting on a Curio when all of a sudden things started to explode, and their hair all get messed up from that incident...

t_ch: 他们现在正在努力复现这个实验，结果…变成「爆炸头」的科员反倒越来越多了。
t_en: After that, people tried to recreate the experiment to figure out what happened, but instead of fixing things, more and more people started getting this very popular, luscious hairstyle.

t_ch: 我没什么想问的了。
t_en: I don't have any other questions.

t_ch: 还是不打扰你了。
t_en: I better leave you alone.

t_ch: 嗯好，那我们回头再聊！
t_en: All right, till next time then!

t_ch: 是你呀，空间站的事情多亏了你的帮忙。
t_en: It's you! Thanks for helping out on the station.

t_ch: 怎么了，是遇到什么麻烦了吗？
t_en: Did you encounter some problems?

t_ch: 我想找你聊聊…
t_en: Can we talk...?

t_ch: 可以呀，你想聊些什么？
t_en: Of course. What do you want to talk about?

t_ch: 空间站里还有别的匿名群吗？
t_en: Are there other anonymous group chats on the station?

t_ch: 有是有…不过规模远远不如之前那个大，都是些交流兴趣爱好的小群。
t_en: There are... but none of them are as big as the one we dealt with. Most of them are just for people who share the same hobbies to exchange ideas.

t_ch: 你也在那个群里吗？
t_en: Were you in the group chat we busted?

t_ch: 你猜～
t_en: Take a guess~

t_ch: 法政科的理查去哪儿了？
t_en: What happened to Richard from the Department of Galactic Geopolitics?

t_ch: 他啊，收拾包袱回家去了。
t_en: Ah, he was sacked.

t_ch: 有科员举报他此前多次抹黑过其他科员，我核实了下，的确是真的…哎…现在还有人说，开除他都是轻的呢。
t_en: There are reports from other researchers saying that he had a history of slandering other people. I did some fact checking and that turned out to be the case. Some even think he deserves worse than getting sacked.

t_ch: 我没什么想问的了。
t_en: I don't have any other questions.

t_ch: 还是不打扰你了。
t_en: I better leave you alone.

t_ch: 嗯好，那我们回头再聊！
t_en: All right, till next time then!

t_ch: 那个…歼星舰的事…
t_en: Um... about the starnought...

t_ch: 噢…答应过你的事我可没忘，但真的很抱歉……
t_en: Oh, of course I remember that. But I'm afraid you'll have to be more patient...

t_ch: 这东西是限量发售的，我一直没抢到…我已经挂高价去收购了，但是一直到现在也没人愿意转手。
t_en: They only made limited copies of it, you see... and I haven't been able to get my hands on them. I've sent out the word that I'm willing to buy them even at a high price, but so far I haven't heard back from anybody.

t_ch: 哎，说来也是，试问谁会不喜欢歼星舰呢？
t_en: Now that I think about it, it's understandable that people are not willing to sell theirs. After all, who doesn't love a starnought?

t_ch: 这可不仅仅是普通的电影联名…这是一种情怀、爱好，代表着一个人的品味与修养…我要是抢到了我估计也不会舍得卖。
t_en: This is no ordinary film cross-over... It's about passion and taste. I wouldn't sell mine if I got one.

t_ch: 啊，你好！我叫…呃，萍萍姐给我起了个名字…叫…叫什么来着？啊，是婷婷！我叫温婷婷！
t_en: Hi, there! I am... um, Wenfry gave me a name... What was it again? Ah, it's Wendy! My name is Wendy!

t_ch: 你长得和我们都不一样…你该不会是空间站的科员吧？你能给我讲讲你们科室的故事吗？
t_en: You look different from us... Are you a space station researcher? Can you share some stories about your department with me?

t_ch: （讲述你在空间站的经历）
t_en: (Tell her about your experience at the space station)

t_ch: 好厉害！不过…你讲的很多东西我都有点听不懂。哎，要是萍萍姐来听，她肯定听得懂，我要是能和她一样聪明就好了。
t_en: That's awesome! But... I'm having trouble following many of the things you said. Alas, if Wenfry were here, I'm sure she could get it. I wish I were as smart as her.

t_ch: 我不是科员，但比他们厉害。
t_en: I'm not a researcher, but I'm greater than one.

t_ch: 诶？你不是科员，那你为什么会出现在这儿？我还以为你是从上面下来的呢。
t_en: Eh? How come you're here if you aren't a researcher? I thought you came down from up there.

t_ch: 你长得真高啊，感觉你一定很聪明，萍萍姐就比我高一点，但她知道的可真多……
t_en: You must be very smart given how tall you are. Wenfry is slightly taller and so much more knowledgeable than me...

t_ch: 啊，又是你！我认得你，上次见过你我还问你是不是空间站的科员嘛！我叫……
t_en: Ah, it's you again! I met you before, and I asked you whether you were a researcher last time! My name is...

t_ch: 我叫…呃，萍萍姐给我起了个名字…叫…叫什么来着？啊，是婷婷！我叫温婷婷！
t_en: My name is... um, Wenfry gave me a name... What was it again? Ah, it's Wendy! My name is Wendy!

t_ch: 你找我是有什么事吗？
t_en: How can I help you?

t_ch: 我有些问题想问你…
t_en: I have some questions for you...

t_ch: 为什么你也姓温？
t_en: Why are there so many Wens on the space station?

t_ch: 萍萍姐说，空间站的科员都姓温，这可能是他们成为科员的一种仪式吧。
t_en: According to Wenfry, "Wen" is the official last name of space station researchers. It might be some sort of initiation ritual for them.

t_ch: 萍萍姐还说…能当科员的人都很聪明，我想变得跟科员们一样聪明，所以萍萍姐干脆就给我俩改了个「正式科员名」。
t_en: Ms. Wenfry also said that the researchers were all brilliant people. I wanted to be smart like them, so she gave both of us a researcher name.

t_ch: 「萍萍姐」是谁？
t_en: Who is this Wenfry?

t_ch: 萍萍姐是我最好的朋友！我们连气味都是差不多的呢，都是桃桃味的，不过她的味道要更浓郁一些。
t_en: Wenfry is my best friend! We even have a similar peachy scent, though hers is stronger.

t_ch: 这就是为什么她比我聪明、懂得多——虽说我们从小就在这儿，也没出过门，但她对外界的一举一动了如指掌，哎，我要是能像她一样聪明就好了……
t_en: That's why she's smarter and more knowledgeable than me. Although we've never left this place since we were little, she's able to keep abreast of things. *sigh* If only I were as smart as her...

t_ch: 你打听空间站的事做什么？
t_en: Why are you trying to find out about the space station?

t_ch: 萍萍姐说这里很无聊，我也这么觉得，她说我们可以「上去」空间站看看，不过我们还没找着路。
t_en: Wenfry said it was boring here. That's how I feel too. She also said we could go up to take a look at the space station, but we haven't found the route.

t_ch: 萍萍姐有空的时候会跟我讲空间站里的事，不过她不是随时都有空，所以……
t_en: Ms. Wenfry tells me about the space station whenever she has time, but she's not always free, so...

t_ch: 我没什么想问的了。
t_en: I have no more questions.

t_ch: 好吧，那下次再聊。
t_en: Sure, let's talk another time.

t_ch: 听说空间站就在我们头顶上，不知道空间站的生活会是什么样的呢？真想和萍萍姐一起去看看……
t_en: I heard the space station is just above us, I wonder what life there is like? I really wanna go take a look with Wenfry...

t_ch: 还是不打扰你了。
t_en: I'll leave you to it.

t_ch: 好哦，有空的话可以多跟我聊聊，我有时候也挺无聊的。
t_en: Sure thing! Come talk to me more when you're free. It gets pretty boring sometimes.

t_ch: 听说空间站就在我们头顶上，不知道空间站的生活会是什么样的呢？真想和萍萍姐一起去看看……
t_en: I heard the space station is just above us, I wonder what life there is like? I really wanna go take a look with Wenfry...

t_ch: 成天窝在这里真没意思，这里的一切都没意思…呃，呜呜伯除外…还有…婷婷除外。
t_en: It's suuuuper boring to be cooped up here all day. Everything here is boring... Um, except for Wubbaboo... and Wendy.

t_ch: 咦，你长得好奇怪，我从来没见过这么高的…呃，难道你就是呜呜伯口中的…空间站的科员？
t_en: Mm, you look funny. I've never seen such a tall... Um, are you that... space station researcher that Wubbaboo talks about?

t_ch: 长得高又不是我的错。
t_en: It's not my fault I grew so tall.

t_ch: 我听说过，科员通常都是一种叫「人类」的物种，听呜呜伯说，照顾它们的科员是个小不点儿，跟我们差不多高。
t_en: I hear that researchers are typically humans. Wubbaboo says that their caretaker is kinda short, about the same height as us.

t_ch: 但没想到还有你这么高的科员，没想到「人类」的品种如此不稳定，真是令我大失所望。
t_en: I'm surprised to see a researcher as tall as you. It's disappointing for me to see the human species being so unstable.

t_ch: 你猜～
t_en: Take a guess!

t_ch: 你猜我猜不猜。
t_en: Guess if I'll take a guess.

t_ch: 它发出了一声不满的叫声，但在你听来倒像是某种小型猫科动物从喉咙间挤出来的咕噜声。
t_en: It lets out a disgruntled snort, which sounds like a purr coming from the throat of a small feline creature.

t_ch: 它认真地闻了闻你衣角的味道，不满地皱起了眉头。
t_en: It gives the hem of your clothing a serious sniff and frowns disapprovingly.

t_ch: 你身上的味道好奇怪，有铁锈味、有淡淡的清香，还有…好多不同的感觉？难道这就是「科员」的味道？
t_en: The smell on you is quite strange. There's a metallic, rusty scent, a faint freshness, and... so many different senses? Is this what they call the "researcher" smell?

t_ch: 是了，呜呜伯说你们要经常做实验来着…原来如此…空间站上面真有意思，连气味都这么复杂，真好啊…不像我，成天困在这个破地方，什么都做不了……
t_en: Yes, Wubbaboo said you guys have to do research regularly... I see now... The space station is really fascinating, even the smells are so complex. It's amazing... Unlike me, stuck in this lousy place all day with nothing much to do...

t_ch: 成天窝在这里真没意思，这里的一切都没意思…呃，呜呜伯除外…还有…婷婷除外。
t_en: It's suuuuper boring to be cooped up here all day. Everything here is boring... Um, except for Wubbaboo... and Wendy.

t_ch: 咦，又是你，有什么事吗？
t_en: Oh, it's you again. What's up?

t_ch: 我想问……
t_en: I want to ask...

t_ch: 你也认识呜呜伯？
t_en: Do you know Wubbaboo too?

t_ch: 是啊，这里来了个呜呜伯，我和它聊过了，它是从空间站的什么夹层里偷偷溜下来的，还给我讲了很多空间站的故事。
t_en: Yes, there's a Wubbaboo here. I had a chat with it, and it said it sneaked out from some sort of compartment in the space station, even told me a lot of stories about the space station.

t_ch: 呜呜伯看起来不太聪明的样子…正因如此，才会被约瑟夫那个装腔作势的家伙利用，可惜我说的它又听不进去，哎……
t_en: Wubbaboo seems a bit slow... That's why it's being manipulated by that pretentious Joseph guy. I pointed that out to Wubbaboo, but my advice fell on deaf ears...

t_ch: 你很想去其他舱段逛逛？
t_en: Would you like to visit the other zones?

t_ch: 观光？拜托，别把我当成呜呜伯那种长不大的小家伙，我才不像它一样，成天没心没肺地傻乐。
t_en: As in to sightsee? Oh, please, don't treat me like one of those Wubbaboo. I'm nothing like it, I don't spend my days goofing around.

t_ch: 我想清楚了，根据呜呜伯的描述，我评估过自己的智力水平，感觉和它口中的科员没什么差别，我觉得我也能当科员。
t_en: I've thought it all through. Based on Wubbaboo's description and my evaluation of my intelligence level, I don't think there's much difference between me and the researchers as mentioned by Wubbaboo. I'm sure I can be a researcher too.

t_ch: 我要悄悄地搞科研，等研究出成果了，再狠狠地惊艳阮•梅女士！
t_en: I'm going to secretly work on my research. If everything goes well, I'll be able to blow Miss Ruan Mei away with my result!

t_ch: 为什么你也姓温？
t_en: Why are there so many Wens on the space station?

t_ch: 我听呜呜伯说，照顾它的什么「界子科」科员是个叫「温得了」的小孩。他们科室的其他人，无论老少，也都姓温，这好像是一种科室传统。
t_en: I heard from the Wubbaboo that the Department of Ecolurgy researcher who took care of it was a kid named Wen Deliao or something. Many people in that department, old or young, have Wen as their last name. It seems to be a tradition of that department.

t_ch: 我觉得我作为阮•梅女士麾下最具潜力的生命体，未来入主「界子科」是必然的事。所以就提前改个名字，以便未来和大家打成一片。
t_en: As the most promising lifeform under Miss Ruan Mei's guidance, I believe I'll one day lead the Department of Ecolurgy. So, I've changed my name in advance to blend in with everyone else when the day comes.

t_ch: 你听错名字了吧？
t_en: Are you sure you didn't mishear the name?

t_ch: 我绝对没听错，它说的就是「温得了」，你不信就去打听打听？
t_en: I was sure the name is "Wen Deliao." You can find out for yourself if you don't believe me.

t_ch: 这算哪门子「传统」？
t_en: What kind of tradition is that?

t_ch: 我曾经思考过这个问题，有两种可能，要么是他们那颗星球上的人都姓温，要么就是进了「界子科」的都要给自己起一个代号，我认为应该是后者。
t_en: I wondered about that before, and I figured there are two possible explanations — either everyone on the planet has the last name of Wen, or all researchers that join the Department of Ecolurgy are required to have a codename. I believe it's the latter.

t_ch: 我没什么想问的了。
t_en: I have no more questions.

t_ch: 嗯哼，那就请回吧，我需要一些独处时间。
t_en: Well, you'd better take your leave. I need some time alone.

t_ch: 还是不打扰你了。
t_en: I'll leave you to it.

t_ch: 嗯好，下次再聊，下次…下次你可以给我讲讲空间站的见闻。
t_en: Sure, let's talk again soon. Next time... you can share your experience at the space station with me.

t_ch: 我得调整下对空间站科员的认知了，他们的智商似乎也没有比我高多少…看来我也可以当科员，我有这实力，绝对够。
t_en: I should probably change my perception of the space station researchers, they don't seem to be that much more intelligent than I am... Looks like I have what it takes to be a researcher too.

t_ch: 你听到了富有节奏感的哼唱，精神满满的音调让你感觉劳动真光荣。
t_en: You hear the humming of a rhythmic tune. The energetic tune makes you feel proud of your labor.

t_ch: 嘿呦，嘿呦，嘿嘿呦！
t_en: Dum, da-dum, dee-dum!

t_ch: 你是来找阮•梅女士的吗？她暂时不在哦，不过阮•梅女士很快就会回来啦！
t_en: Are you here to meet Miss Ruan Mei? She's not around at the moment, but she'll be back soon!

t_ch: 你看起来很忙的样子。
t_en: You seem very busy.

t_ch: 阮•梅女士不在的日子，我们也不能偷懒呀。
t_en: We can't slack off even though Miss Ruan Mei isn't here.

t_ch: 不用多礼，我只是来随便逛逛。
t_en: Don't stand on ceremony. I'm just here for a casual visit.

t_ch: 这是我们应该做的。
t_en: We're just doing what we should.

t_ch: 下次阮•梅女士回来的时候，她就能够在更舒适的环境下工作了。到时候她一定会很开心的！
t_en: Miss Ruan Mei is coming back to a more comfy working place. I'm sure she'll be thrilled!

t_ch: 你看到汗珠从它脸上滚落，坚定的双眼中饱含着期待。
t_en: You see beads of sweat trickling down its face, and its eyes are brimming with anticipation.

t_ch: 我想说…
t_en: Actually...

t_ch: 也许阮•梅看不到你的工作。
t_en: Maybe Ruan Mei can't even see your effort.

t_ch: 她有那么多的造物要去爱，一时间看不到我们也是很正常的！
t_en: Since she has to give her love to so many of her creations, it's perfectly normal for her to overlook us for some time!

t_ch: 没关系！让阮•梅女士感受到无微不至的服务就已经足够了！我相信时间一定会让她感动。
t_en: It doesn't matter! I'm happy as long as Miss Ruan Mei can enjoy my meticulous service! I believe she'll be touched over time.

t_ch: 也许阮•梅早就注意到你了。
t_en: Maybe Ruan Mei has noticed you for a long time.

t_ch: 真…真的吗？阮•梅女士创造了那么多的新生命，竟然会注意到我！那也太幸福了……
t_en: R—Really? It's hard to believe she notices me out of so many of her creations! That's amazing...

t_ch: 话说回来，也许这就是真的呢？不行，我要更加努力，不能辜负阮•梅女士的期待啊！
t_en: There's a chance it's true, isn't it? I must work harder to never let Miss Ruan Mei down!

t_ch: 那该怎么办呢……今天把一周的活都干完吧！
t_en: What should I do about that... Let me finish the work for the entire week today!

t_ch: 也许你不用期待阮•梅的关注。
t_en: Maybe you should stop expecting attention from Ruan Mei.

t_ch: 阮•梅女士是我们的创造者，我们不能离开她。
t_en: Miss Ruan Mei is our creator. We can't leave her alone.

t_ch: 要是我们都离开阮•梅女士，她该怎么排解自己的烦恼啊…想想就很孤单，不行，绝对不行！
t_en: How is she going to deal with her troubles without us... I can feel her loneliness just by imagining the situation. No way! I can't let that happen!

t_ch: 无论何时无论何地，我们永远是阮•梅女士温暖的后盾！
t_en: We'll always support Miss Ruan Mei at all times and places!

t_ch: 我没什么想说的了。
t_en: I don't have anything else to say.

t_ch: 祝你好运，下次再聊。
t_en: Good luck and let's talk another time.

t_ch: 嗯嗯，感谢您的祝福！努力一定会带来好运！
t_en: Thanks for your wish! I believe good luck comes with hard work!

t_ch: 今天的工作还没完成呢，我还要继续加油。希望下一次阮•梅女士来的时候，会对我们的工作刮目相看！
t_en: I have to keep my nose to the grindstone to finish the work today. Hopefully, Miss Ruan Mei will be impressed by our work when she visits!

t_ch: 你注意到它在跟着一种奇怪的旋律哼唱着，尽管唱歌水平在你看来和帕姆有得一拼。
t_en: You notice it humming a strange tune with a voice almost as bad as Pom-Pom's.

t_ch: 阮•梅的造物们都是好朋友，让我们来手牵手~
t_en: Ruan Mei's creations are all good friends. Let us all hold hands~

t_ch: 啊，你好！我还是第一次见到…阮•梅女士以外的人，但你身上好像有熟悉的味道——呜呜！是她的味道，我闻得出来！
t_en: Hello! This is the first time I've met someone besides Miss Ruan Mei, but your scent smells familiar to me... Oh! It's her scent! I can tell!

t_ch: 是阮•梅女士派你来找我吗？她终于想起我了？！
t_en: Did Miss Ruan Mei send you here? Did she finally think of me!?

t_ch: 不是，她可能在忙别的事。
t_en: Nope. She's probably attending to some other affairs.

t_ch: 这样啊…也是，毕竟她那么忙……
t_en: I see... Well, she has a lot of things on her plate...

t_ch: 她早把你们忘了吧。
t_en: I think she's long forgotten about you guys.

t_ch: 它似乎快要哭了，但撇了撇嘴后又把泪珠憋了回去，使劲挤出一个并不怎么好看的笑容。
t_en: It is verging on crying, but it purses its lips and holds its tears back. Then, it forces a stiff smile on its face.

t_ch: 才不是呢！不许这么说阮•梅女士！她只是、她只是…只是在忙别的事，这里这么乱也不方便回来！
t_en: That's impossible! Don't ever say such things about Miss Ruan Mei! I'm sure she's just... just caught up by other matters. There's no good time for her to come back as the place is too much of a mess now!

t_ch: 我们的造物主很忙很忙，她在很努力地做研究，我们也要努力地工作，好好修复这里的一切…否则就是在给阮•梅女士丢人！
t_en: Our creator is extremely busy with her research. So, we have to do our best to fix everything here, or we'll be a disgrace to her!

t_ch: 这种事情太可怕了，我们决不能给阮•梅女士丢人！
t_en: That's such a terrifying thing to happen! We'll never be a disgrace to Miss Ruan Mei!

t_ch: 它一直在跟着一段重复的旋律轻声哼唱，但你觉得听多了似乎还挺悦耳的。
t_en: It has been humming the same tune over and over again, and it starts to grow on you over time.

t_ch: 阮•梅的造物们都是好朋友，让我们来手牵手~
t_en: Ruan Mei's creations are all good friends. Let us all hold hands~

t_ch: 啊，又见面了，这次是有什么事吗？
t_en: Oh, we meet again. What can I do for you this time?

t_ch: 我有点好奇…
t_en: There's something I'm curious about...

t_ch: 你是如何看待阮•梅的？
t_en: What are your thoughts on Ruan Mei?

t_ch: 阮•梅…阮•梅女士…她是我们伟大的造物主，虽然她总是很忙，但我知道她在创造我们的时候一定倾注了很多很多的爱。
t_en: Ruan Mei... Miss Ruan Mei is our great creator. Although she's always busy, I know she must have poured a lot of love into creating me back then.

t_ch: 这种感觉…呃，抱歉，你没有「红豆冰」这种馅，我很难跟你解释清楚……
t_en: This feeling... Well, it's hard for me to explain to someone like you who doesn't have the filling of red bean ice...

t_ch: 但我感觉得到，有时候是眼泪流淌的触感，有时候是很温暖的触摸感，总之，我能感受到她在培育我们的时候留下的爱……
t_en: But I can feel it. Sometimes it's the feeling of tears dribbling down my face, and sometimes it feels like touches filled with warmth. Anyway, I can feel the love she gave when she was creating us...

t_ch: 你一直在等她？
t_en: Have you been waiting for her?

t_ch: 是的，不止是我，大家都在等她回来。不过老实说，这一层乱哄哄的，我感觉她要回来也没个下脚的地方。
t_en: Yup. Not just me, but everyone else too. To be honest, this floor is too chaotic. She wouldn't have a place to stay if she were to come back.

t_ch: 所以我和其他造物，还有那些勤劳的小机器人一直在努力修复这个区域。等我们把舱段修复好了，她回来的时候起码有个干净舒适的地方可以休息……
t_en: So, the other creations and I, as well as those diligent little robots, have been working hard to fix this zone. With that, Miss Ruan Mei will at least have a clean and comfortable place to stay when she returns...

t_ch: 你的名字是有什么故事吗？
t_en: Is there a story behind your name?

t_ch: 我听我们中最聪明的「贤者」说，我和绿豆酥的配方有点特殊。
t_en: According to the wisest among us, Mung Bean Cake and I are made with a special recipe.

t_ch: 好像是加入了一些特殊的材料，我这种口味会让人共感到「爱」的存在。但大家都说，是一些让人流眼泪的刺激性物体，并不是「爱」。
t_en: Thanks to a special ingredient, I seem to be able to make people feel the presence of love. Yet, everyone says that it is due to some tear-inducing substance, not love.

t_ch: 可我觉得大家说得不对，「爱」这种口味本来就是让人流眼泪的，所以阮•梅女士并没有创造失败……
t_en: But I don't agree with them. The flavor of love is supposed to make people cry, so I'm not a failed creation of Miss Ruan Mei...

t_ch: 我没什么想问的了。
t_en: I have no more questions.

t_ch: 好吧…回去的时候路上小心些，这附近的区域还没清理干净，外面也很危险。
t_en: Alright... Please be careful on your way back, as the nearby areas have yet to be thoroughly cleaned, and it's quite dangerous outside.

t_ch: 我还有事，先不聊了。
t_en: I've got to go. Talk to you later.

t_ch: 你要走了？好吧，没关系，我习惯了…毕竟每个人都是要离开的…没事，咱们下次再聊吧。
t_en: Are you leaving? No problem. I'm used to it... After all, separation is inevitable... Let's catch up next time.

t_ch: 说起来，你和我们不一样，我们都是阮•梅造物，你感受到了吗？她的爱…都凝结在这里。
t_en: You're different from us, you know? We're Ruan Mei's creations. Can you feel it? Her love... It's all here in this place.

t_ch: 你要是能感受到就好了，她给我们的爱，有这么这么这么这么这么多！
t_en: If only you could feel her love for us. It's sooooo much!

t_ch: 阮•梅…哎……
t_en: Ruan Mei... *sigh*

t_ch: 哎…阮•梅……
t_en: *sigh* Ruan Mei...

t_ch: 不该喊「阮•梅女士」吗？
t_en: Aren't you supposed to call her "Miss Ruan Mei"?

t_ch: 阮•梅女士…哎……
t_en: Miss Ruan Mei... *sigh*

t_ch: 哎…阮•梅女士……
t_en: *sigh* Miss Ruan Mei...

t_ch: 年纪轻轻的别老叹气。
t_en: Don't just keep sighing at such a young age.

t_ch: 它抬起头瞪了瞪你，发现你无动于衷，于是低下头去当做什么也没发生过。
t_en: It looks up and glares at you. Seeing your indifference, it lowers its head and pretends nothing has happened.

t_ch: …你不也很年轻，装什么成熟。
t_en: ...Stop pretending to be mature when you're young yourself.

t_ch: 灰灰说我这口味都过时了…是不是我这口味恶心到你了，要不然你怎么还不走，你都挡着我的光了，哎……
t_en: Ashy said I was an outdated snack... Do you find me disgusting? Why are you still here? You're blocking my light. *sigh*

t_ch: 阮•梅…哎……
t_en: Ruan Mei... *sigh*

t_ch: 哎？又是你，说吧，找我是有何贵干？
t_en: Huh? It's you again. Just tell me what brings you here.

t_ch: 我想问…
t_en: I want to ask you something...

t_ch: 你问吧…虽然我现在没有心情，我不保证能回答你所有问题。
t_en: You can ask... although I'm not in the mood. I can't promise I'll answer all your questions.

t_ch: 你就不能振作点吗？
t_en: Can't you pull yourself together?

t_ch: 不能，我的心已经被盐渍过了，酸酸的，咸咸的，你感受到了吗？
t_en: I can't. My heart has been pickled with salt — it's sour and salty. Can you feel it?

t_ch: 我最深爱的造物主抛弃了我，因为我从内而外都是眼泪的味道，连她都不爱我了…你让我怎么振作得起来。
t_en: My creator, whom I love deeply, has abandoned me because I taste like tears from the inside out. Even she doesn't love me anymore... How am I supposed to pull myself together?

t_ch: 盐渍冬梅这口味真奇怪…
t_en: Salty Rimeplume is quite an acquired taste...

t_ch: 是吧，豆沙灰灰说得没错，「盐渍冬梅」的味道已经过时了，所以阮•梅女士打心底不喜欢我，所以她一直不回来看我。
t_en: Right? Gray Bean Paste's not wrong to say that I'm an outdated snack. That's why Miss Ruan Mei dislikes me from the bottom of her heart and never comes back to visit me.

t_ch: 这种咸甜酸涩混杂在一起的味道，我果然是不配被爱的，哎……
t_en: My flavor — a mixture of salty, sweet, sour, and bitter — doesn't deserve to be loved. *sigh*

t_ch: 其实我觉得你还蛮可爱的。
t_en: I actually find you quite adorable.

t_ch: 啊？你再这样说我可要信了……
t_en: Huh? I'm going to think you mean it if you keep saying that...

t_ch: 算了…你不用安慰我了。我自己是个什么口味我自己心里清楚，这种过时的味道…没人会爱我的，没人……
t_en: Forget it... You don't have to say that to make me feel better. I know myself well. No one... No one's going to like such an outdated snack like me...

t_ch: 我没什么想问的了。
t_en: I have no more questions.

t_ch: 我就知道，没有人会想和我聊天的。
t_en: I knew it, nobody would want to chat with me.

t_ch: 算了，这天是聊不下去了。
t_en: Well, I'm struggling to keep this conversation going.

t_ch: 你看吧，连你也不喜欢我。
t_en: See? Even you don't like me.

t_ch: 算了，我早该知道的，我这种过时的口味，为什么我还要抱有一丝希望呢？
t_en: Forget it. I should have known better. As an outdated snack, I shouldn't have harbored any more hopes of being liked.

t_ch: 还是放弃吧，我、不，严格来说是我们——我们所有被创造出来的生命，我们都过时了，我们是没有未来的。
t_en: It's time to give up. I — or more precisely — we, the created beings, are all outdated. We don't have a future.

t_ch: 你将这小家伙安置在植物房里吸收星光，这对缓解它的负面情绪似乎颇有成效。
t_en: You accommodate the tiny thing in the botanical room to absorb starlight, which seems to be quite effective in assuaging its negative emotions.

t_ch: 至少现在，它的眼泪不会再淹没这附近的无辜植物了。
t_en: At least its tears no longer drown the innocent plants nearby now.

t_ch: 阮•梅…呜呜…她抛弃了我们…呜呜……
t_en: Ruan Mei... *sobs* She's abandoned us... *sobs*

t_ch: 是你？我记得你，你走之后就再也没回来看过我…现在倒好，看我被丢在这个垃圾回收站里，是不是很丢人？是不是很丢人！喵！
t_en: It's you? I remember you. You never visit again after leaving. Look, I'm being dumped at the recycling station! Isn't it embarrassing? Isn't it? Meow!

t_ch: 小家伙抬头见是你，收敛了哭腔，对你骂骂咧咧，似乎对你颇有微词。
t_en: The moment the tiny thing sees you, it holds back its teary voice and starts grumbling at you. It seems to be slightly annoyed at you.

t_ch: 一点也不丢人。
t_en: This isn't shameful at all.

t_ch: 真的吗？我还以为，我是没有受到阮•梅的认可的失败作，所以才被丢到垃圾房里，呜……
t_en: Really? I thought I was dumped here because I failed to impress Ruan Mei... *sobs*

t_ch: 别这么消极，多晒星光。
t_en: Don't feel dejected. You should get more starlight.

t_ch: 星光？我的心里灰扑扑的，连星光都不愿意照耀我…你不喜欢我…阮•梅也不喜欢我，呜呜……
t_en: Starlight? I feel so down that even the starlight is avoiding me... You don't like me, and neither does Ruan Mei... *sob, sob*

t_ch: 它看起来很难过，将尾巴紧紧地卷在自己脚边，不安地看着你。
t_en: Looking distraught, it curls its tail tightly around its feet and stares at you uneasily.

t_ch: 我是个…阮•梅都不要的失败品，你来，你是来看我笑话的吗？喵？
t_en: I'm just a failure that even Ruan Mei doesn't want. Say, are you here to laugh at me? Meow?

t_ch: 阮•梅…呜呜…她抛弃了我们…呜呜……
t_en: Ruan Mei... *sobs* She's abandoned us... *sobs*

t_ch: 你怎么又来了？是又要送我去什么垃圾回收站吗？
t_en: Why are you here again? Are you sending me to some recycling station again?

t_ch: 虽然小家伙还是带着哭腔，但你在它的眼眸中感受到某种期盼，过去的灰暗似乎消失了不少。
t_en: Although the little guy's voice is still bitter, you can discern a trace of hope in its eyes. It seems like much of its past gloominess has dissipated.

t_ch: 才不是，我有些话想跟你说…
t_en: You've got the wrong idea. There's something I want to tell you...

t_ch: 还有我在你身边呢。
t_en: I'm here for you.

t_ch: 真的吗？你这么说…意思是不是…因为阮•梅、阮•梅放弃我了？所以你可怜我？
t_en: Really? Is it... because Ruan Mei has given up on me? Are you doing this out of sympathy?

t_ch: 去找你的小伙伴聊聊吧。
t_en: You should talk to your peers.

t_ch: 他们？只有盐渍冬梅愿意理我，其他人都嫌我成天只会哭，不愿意跟我玩。
t_en: My peers? Only Salty Rimeplume is willing to talk to me. Everyone else avoids me because I'm crying all the time.

t_ch: 还有…还有芝士流心，它有时候会故意过来嘲笑我，呜呜…它说是因为我太失败了，阮•梅才不回来看我。
t_en: And... there's also Molten Cheese Tart, who sometimes comes out of its way just to mock me. *sniffles* It said that Ruan Mei didn't visit me because that's how much of a loser I am.

t_ch: 也许她正在想你。
t_en: Perhaps, she's thinking about you now.

t_ch: 你是说阮•梅、阮•梅在想我？呜…就算她想到我了，也只会奇怪为什么会创造出这么失败的生命吧…
t_en: Do you mean Ruan Mei— Ruan Mei is thinking about me now? I guess, even if she is, she must be wondering what has gone wrong in creating me...

t_ch: 如果、如果她真的想我了，为什么还要让你把我安置在这里，却又不来见我呢？
t_en: If she's really thinking about me, why does she send you to accommodate me here and refuse to visit me?

t_ch: 你不是失败品，你很独特。
t_en: You aren't a failure, you're special.

t_ch: 独特？如果我真的那么特别，那为什么她不带我一起走？
t_en: Special? If I'm really special, why doesn't she take me with her?

t_ch: 阮•梅并不需要我这样的失败品，就算再独特，也始终是失败品！喵！是失败品！
t_en: Ruan Mei doesn't need a failure like me. No matter how special I am, I'm still a failure! Meow! A failure!

t_ch: 我没什么想说的了。
t_en: I don't have anything else to say.

t_ch: 看吧，连你也不想理我了，呜呜……
t_en: See? Even you're ignoring me. *sobs*

t_ch: 我要说的说完了。
t_en: That's all I have to say.

t_ch: 和你聊了几句，我感觉自己的心里好像没以前那么灰扑扑了。
t_en: I seem to feel better after talking to you.

t_ch: 可我心里还是空空荡荡的，我这种豆沙馅，看上去就是发霉的东西……
t_en: Yet, there's still an emptiness in my heart. My bean paste filling makes me look moldy...

t_ch: 我就知道…我是失败品…你们也是失败品，这里就是垃圾回收站，我们注定要被扔进垃圾桶里！喵！
t_en: I knew it... I'm a failure, and so are all of you. This is the recycling station, and we're destined to be dumped! Meow!

t_ch: 你看着很面生，估计是从其他地方过来的吧？大老远的来找我是有什么事吗？
t_en: I don't think I've seen you before. You aren't local, are you? Why did you come all the way here to see me?

t_ch: 哦对了，你有预约吗？你这没有预约，咱们得长话短说——没办法，我的日程表总是排得满满当当。
t_en: Oh, by the way, do you have an appointment? If not, we'll have to make it quick. I have a busy schedule, you know.

t_ch: 哦，是你啊，怎么，有事吗？咱们得长话短说——没办法，我的日程表总是排得满满当当。
t_en: Oh, it's you. What can I do for you? We'll have to make it quick. I have a busy schedule, you know.

t_ch: 什么预约？
t_en: Appointment?

t_ch: 我是这里的「特别联络员」，成天要和各色各样的物种打交道，我这种大忙人，你要见我，自然得找我提前预约。
t_en: As the special liaison officer here, I deal with people from all walks of life daily. You need an appointment to meet someone as busy as me.

t_ch: 做事，咳，做事得排个轻重缓急先来后到，遵守社交礼仪，这样才能跟大家打好关系。
t_en: Ahem, I handle things according to my priorities and with good manners. That's how I get on good terms with everyone.

t_ch: 以我的身份，还要预约？
t_en: Do I really need an appointment, considering who I am?

t_ch: 你是…？
t_en: You are?

t_ch: 约瑟夫突然压低了声音，靠近你的耳朵——噢它踮起了不知道藏在哪儿的脚——但又失败了，你不得不弯下腰，他这才放心地开口。
t_en: Joseph suddenly lowers his voice and edges closer toward your ear. It tries to stand on tiptoes with its previously hidden feet, but fails. You have to bend over to make him feel comfortable enough to speak.

t_ch: 你是空间站的大人物吧，我不是刻意怠慢你，只是我还有些事要处理。
t_en: You're a big shot from the space station, aren't you? I'm not making you wait on purpose, and I really have some matters to attend to.

t_ch: 现在大家都指望我和那些小铁皮罐子沟通协商，我总得照顾下大家情绪，等我私底下得空了咱们再慢慢聊哈。
t_en: Now, everyone's counting on me to negotiate with those little tin cans. I can't let them down. Let's talk in private when I'm free.

t_ch: 所以，你找我是有什么事吗？长话短说，时间宝贵。
t_en: So, what can I do for you? Please make it short and sweet, I don't have all day.

t_ch: 我想问…
t_en: I'd like to ask...

t_ch: 「特别联络员」的职责是？
t_en: What are the duties of the special liaison officer?

t_ch: 沟通和协商是第一要务，尤其是这个跨物种，不同种群间的沟通很重要。鄙人，也是费了无数心血，才和我身边的这位「模特」建立了正式的外交关系。
t_en: Communication and negotiation are my top priorities, especially when it comes to bridging the gap between different species and populations. It took me a ton of effort to establish a proper diplomatic relationship with this "model" by my side.

t_ch: 还有那些小铁皮罐子——就是你们叫「小机器人」的玩意，有时候也得沟通沟通，就是挺费劲，得动手按它们的按钮才能沟通。
t_en: It's also important to reach out to those tin cans — what you people call "little robots" — from time to time. That's quite a hassle, as I need to press their buttons first to talk to them.

t_ch: 你每天都在忙些什么？
t_en: What do you usually busy yourself with?

t_ch: 噢，那可就多了，像咱们都是「阮•梅」造物——哦，你不是，抱歉抱歉——族群内外的沟通，沟通完就得分析局势利弊，然后提供这个…这个一些指导建议。
t_en: Oh, I have lots of things to do. We are all Ruan Mei's creations — oh, not you, my apologies. So, I'm responsible for facilitating communications within and outside the community. I have to analyze every discussion, and then provide... advice and suggestions.

t_ch: 别看我每天都站在这儿，这些事项还挺费劲的，忙得我每天都头大。
t_en: Don't think I have an easy job just because I stand here all day long. I'm actually snowed under with work every day.

t_ch: 呜呜伯怎么就成你的「模特」了？
t_en: How did Wubbaboo end up becoming your "model"?

t_ch: 噢，这个…说来话长了。简单来说就是我有过一个设想，让它成为我们和空间站其他区域的「外交成果展示模特」。
t_en: Well, that's... a long story. To put it simply, I intend to make Wubbaboo a model that represents our diplomatic relationships with other space station zones.

t_ch: 就是让那些什么科员把尖端设备挂在它身上，让它送过来给其他造物们展示，向大家传递友好的信息嘛。
t_en: I'll have those researchers hang advanced equipment on Wubbaboo. Then, Wubbaboo will come back and show the equipment to my people as a friendly gesture.

t_ch: 我没什么想问的了。
t_en: I have no more questions.

t_ch: 哦哦，好的好的。
t_en: Oh, sure.

t_ch: 我没什么想问的了。
t_en: I have no more questions.

t_ch: 行，今天的这个单独会面啊就到这里结束吧，以后还有大把合作机会，我们到时候再聊。
t_en: Well, let's call it a day then. We have plenty of chances to talk when we collaborate in the future.

t_ch: 抱歉抱歉，我这谈判刚结束，手忙脚乱的让你见笑了，还有别的事要收拾，恕不远送了。
t_en: I'm sorry you have to see me in this state, as I've just wrapped up a negotiation. There are some loose ends to tie up, so I won't be able to see you off.

t_ch: 我受够了，为什么换个零件这么复杂！
t_en: I'm so sick of this! Why is it so difficult to replace the part?

t_ch: 拧了半圈还是拧不进去，气死我了，就不能用爪子直接拍进去吗？
t_en: I just can't tighten it, so frustrating! Why can't I just knock it in with my paw?

t_ch: 你会修机器人？
t_en: Do you know how to repair a robot?

t_ch: 嗷！我知道一点，但不多，里面的零件太复杂了我不敢拆，但外面的开关和显示屏我还是会修的。
t_en: Oh, I only know the basics. The parts inside are too complicated for me to disassemble and fix, but the switches and display outside shouldn't be a problem.

t_ch: 就是这只爪子太不争气了，烦死了，就不能长灵活点嘛！
t_en: But this paw of mine is getting under my skin! Why can't they be more flexible!?

t_ch: 你手短短…
t_en: Your fingers are short...

t_ch: 哼，我们爪子是没你灵活，但也有我们的本事，你！你别以为爪子长就了不起！
t_en: Hmph, our paws aren't as flexible as your hands, but we make up for it with other talents. You! Don't think you're better just because you have longer fingers!

t_ch: 我不管你是谁，我正烦着呢，有什么话现在就说！别耽误我干活！
t_en: I don't care who you are, I'm in a bad mood. Whatever you want to say, spill it, and get out of my face!

t_ch: 我受够了，为什么换个零件这么复杂！
t_en: I'm so sick of this! Why is it so difficult to replace the part?

t_ch: 又是你？我正烦着呢，有什么话现在就说！别耽误我干活！
t_en: You again? I'm in a bad mood. Whatever you want to say, spill it, and get out of my face!

t_ch: 我挺好奇的…
t_en: I'm curious...

t_ch: 你在这儿忙什么呢？
t_en: What are you working on here?

t_ch: 喏，这一整个区域，外面的什么车，还有一个能上下传送的大笼子都坏了，就连我们住的地方也不安全。
t_en: Look, everything in this place, some vehicle outside, a cage that can carry things up and down have all gone kaput, and even the place we stay in isn't safe.

t_ch: 你没感受到吗，之前外面有一股很吓人的气息，所以我们得赶紧修缮好。这些小机器人本来是负责维修工作的，可惜时好时坏的，我既要修外面，又要修这里面的机器人……
t_en: Can't you feel the scary atmosphere outside? That's why we have to fix these quickly. These little robots are supposed to be in charge of the repair, but they aren't always in order. I have to fix the things outside and the robots here...

t_ch: 烦死了嗷嗷！
t_en: I've had enough!

t_ch: 你的名字好特别…
t_en: You have a special name...

t_ch: 那是大家给我取的名字，因为我总是很忙，一忙就很烦躁，它们就这么喊我。
t_en: That's the name everyone calls me by, because I'm always busy, and I'm easily annoyed when I'm busy. That's how my name came about.

t_ch: 萍萍姐说是因为我这种口味天生缺乏安全感，好像是少了一味什么材料，这我就不懂了，或许有机缘的话，能去问问创造我的阮•梅女士吧。
t_en: Ms. Wenfry said I was born to be insecure because of a missing ingredient. That, I don't know. Maybe I should ask my creator, Miss Ruan Mei, about it if I have the chance.

t_ch: 遇到困难，可以喊人来帮忙。
t_en: You can ask for help if you run into any trouble.

t_ch: 不行，这是我们的家，这是我们诞生的地方，自己的家自己修。
t_en: No way. This is our home and birthplace. It's our responsibility to maintain it.

t_ch: 而且…这么一点小事就要麻烦别人，阮•梅女士看了多不好，明明是她亲手创造出来的生命，却这么无用…所以，我们得打起精神来好好干活！
t_en: Also... asking for help over such a trivial matter won't make us look good in Miss Ruan Mei's eyes. As her creations, we can't be so useless. We must buck up and work hard!

t_ch: 等一切都修好的那一天，她要是回来看…她一定会为我们感到自豪。
t_en: If she visits us when everything is fixed, I'm sure she'll be proud of us.

t_ch: 我没什么想问了。
t_en: I have nothing else to ask.

t_ch: 好，慢走不送。
t_en: See you.

t_ch: 我没什么想问的了。
t_en: I have no more questions.

t_ch: 我很烦，也很忙，你快些走，别再烦我了。
t_en: I'm annoyed and busy. Please go away and leave me alone.

t_ch: 哎，一天到晚不是故障就是宕机，烦死了！看到这些金属壳子就烦！
t_en: I can't take this anymore! They are either malfunctioning or crashing all day long! The sight of these metal casings is driving me nuts!

t_ch: 怎么了，有点眼力劲儿行吗？没见我正忙着修复机器人吗？
t_en: Are you having trouble seeing? I'm busy fixing this robot, you see?

t_ch: 诶，你到底有什么事，快说啊？我还有一大堆事要做呢！
t_en: Hey, just tell me what you need from me. I have a pile of tasks to complete.

t_ch: 我只是想和你随便聊聊。
t_en: I'm just here for a chat.

t_ch: 随便聊聊？我这里忙得要命，你过来随便聊聊？你真是……
t_en: A chat? That's what you want to do when I'm buried in work? Tsk...

t_ch: 我知道你很急，但你先别急。
t_en: I know you're in a hurry, but please loosen up.

t_ch: 先别急？我这里都快忙晕，你来跟我说先别急？你真是……
t_en: Loosen up? How am I going to loosen up when I'm drowned in work? Tsk...

t_ch: 好吧，说吧，你到底想说什么？有什么事赶紧说，别耽误我时间！
t_en: Fine. Just tell me what's on your mind. Make it quick and don't waste my time!

t_ch: 我想问…
t_en: I'd like to ask...

t_ch: 你是什么口味的呀？
t_en: I wonder what you taste like?

t_ch: …你、你跟我说话就想打听这个？
t_en: ...D—Did you approach me just to ask me that?

t_ch: 有点急的脸上露出一副不可思议的神色，但随之又被诡异攀爬至脸颊的红晕所遮盖。
t_en: A look of incredulity appears on Bit Busy's face, but the expression is soon concealed by the blush that creeps mysteriously up to its cheeks.

t_ch: 它压低了声音，耷拉着头，不情不愿却又清清楚楚地开了口。
t_en: With its head drooped, Bit Busy speaks in a hushed but clear voice reluctantly.

t_ch: 泡椒芒芒饭。
t_en: Pickled pepper and mango rice.

t_ch: 你瞬间明白了它的秉性为何如此急躁，原来是生来如此。
t_en: You immediately understand why it is so impatient — it was born that way.

t_ch: 你怎么这么急躁…
t_en: Why are you so impatient?

t_ch: 急躁？你看看，你看看，这里都乱成一团了，如果不及时清理干净，阮•梅要是突然回来了怎么办？看到我们把家里弄得这么脏，她肯定会很伤心的。
t_en: Impatient? Can you see how disorganized this place is? What do we do if Ruan Mei suddenly comes back and the place is not cleaned? She'll be upset to see us turning the place into a mess, that's what.

t_ch: 如果你也有这么多事情要处理，你也会变得急躁！
t_en: You would be impatient too if you had so many things on your plate!

t_ch: 同为她心爱的造物，有些家伙每天就知道站着动动嘴皮子，什么事也不干。我跟它们可不一样，早点修好这里，她就早点回来，我哪有时间跟你这里慢慢磨蹭？
t_en: Some of Ruan Mei's creations never walk the talk and do nothing every day. I'm not like them. The sooner we fix up this place, the sooner Miss Ruan Mei will come back. So, I can't afford to while away my time with you here!

t_ch: 你就是这么跟阮•梅说话的吗？
t_en: Is that how you talk to Ruan Mei?

t_ch: 哼，你又不是她。
t_en: Hmph, you're no Ruan Mei.

t_ch: 有点急不耐烦地撇撇嘴，似乎对你的提问表示不满，但随即又露出了一副向往的表情。
t_en: Bit Busy purses its lips impatiently, feeling displeased with your question. Yet, it quickly switches to a look of longing.

t_ch: 我对她当然不会这样说…只要她想，要我表演什么脸色都行…要是能见到她就好了。
t_en: Of course, I wouldn't speak to her like that... I'd talk in whatever way she desires... How nice would it be if I could meet her?

t_ch: 我没什么想问的了。
t_en: I have no more questions.

t_ch: 那就好，幸好没耽误我太久。
t_en: Great! I'm glad this hasn't taken up too much of my time.

t_ch: 我没什么想问的了。
t_en: I have no more questions.

t_ch: 那就好，我去忙别的事啦。
t_en: Great! I'll get back to my work then.

t_ch: 好了好了，别再喊我了！
t_en: Alright, alright! Stop calling for me!

t_ch: 修复工程正在推进机器人的事我知道了没事你就往边上站着别碍事，懂了吗？
t_en: The restoration work is in progress and I already know what happened to the robots. Don't get in my way if you don't need anything else from me, understand?

t_ch: 怎么了，有点眼力劲儿行吗？没见我正忙着修复机器人吗？
t_en: Are you having trouble seeing? I'm busy fixing this robot, you see?

t_ch: 修复工程正在推进机器人的事我知道了没事你就往边上站着别碍事，懂了吗？
t_en: The restoration work is in progress and I already know what happened to the robots. Don't get in my way if you don't need anything else from me, understand?

t_ch: 我说了在忙我很忙别来打扰我我要思考一下你别再过来烦我啦！
t_en: I already told you I was busy and needed to think. Stop disturbing me!

t_ch: 有点急气鼓鼓地，腮帮子都鼓起了一大块。
t_en: Bit Busy puffs its cheeks in frustration.

t_ch: 没事自己一边玩去！求你了！
t_en: I'm begging you to get out of my way if you need nothing else from me!

t_ch: 有点急不愿再搭理你，或许它真的很忙吧……
t_en: Bit Busy brushes you off. Maybe it is really busy...

t_ch: 咳咳，简单介绍一下，你可以跟它们一样，叫我「全域守望者」，因为我将守望此地，直至我生命尽头。
t_en: Ahem, let me introduce myself. You can call me "Guardian of the Domain" like everyone else, as I'll watch this place till my death.

t_ch: 从名字上你大概就知道我在这里的地位，所以，要找我闲聊可以，但你得掂量掂量自己的分量，懂了吗？
t_en: You can probably tell I'm the bigwig here from my name. I don't chat with every Tom, Dick, and Harry I run into. You know what I'm saying?

t_ch: 这名字也太尴尬了…
t_en: That name is so awkward...

t_ch: 不，这是写实。盖因我弹跳力强，看得远，我有义务也有这个实力去眺望远方，守护这里的一片宁静。
t_en: No, it's a reflection of the truth. With my strong jumping ability and far-reaching vision, I have the obligation and the capability to look out into the distance and maintain peace in this place.

t_ch: 你该不会不知道外面有多危险吧？到处都是那种怪物，到处乱飞，大家出门前都得找我帮忙看看外面情况。
t_en: Do you know how dangerous it is out there? Flying monsters are everywhere, so everyone seeks my help to make sure the area outside is clear before heading out.

t_ch: 这是谁给你取的名字？
t_en: Who gave you the name?

t_ch: 你是说阮•梅女士吗？那倒不是。阮•梅女士按照做出来的口味，喊我「生煎蛋挞」。
t_en: Do you think Miss Ruan Mei named me? She didn't. She called me Pan-fried Egg Tart, which is what I was born as.

t_ch: 但我是个成熟的造物了，我不能用这么软糯的名字，我得有气魄，这样才能让阮•梅女士对我刮目相看。
t_en: But now that I've matured, such a soft name doesn't fit me anymore. I need a more confident vibe to impress Miss Ruan Mei.

t_ch: 方才跟你聊了几句，鄙人发觉你讲话还蛮有气势的。这里的造物天天只会恭维我，我和它们聊起来倒是话不投机。
t_en: I find the way you speak quite assertive from our conversation earlier. The creations here always flatter me, and I'm not on the same wavelength as them.

t_ch: 和你聊天倒是感觉…嗯，怎么说呢，同为领导者，有种惺惺相惜的感觉。太好咯，总算有个知音人能听我讲讲我的管理规划！
t_en: When I talk to you... Hmm, how should I put it? I feel like we share a rapport, like we're both leaders. This is great! I've finally found the right person to share my management plan!

t_ch: 你要是有什么想问的想说的，尽管问，尽管说！
t_en: If you have anything to say or ask, feel free to fire away!

t_ch: 噢，是你啊，太好咯，总算有个知音人能听我讲讲我的管理规划！
t_en: Oh, it's you! This is great! I've finally found the right person to share my management plan!

t_ch: 你要是有什么想问的想说的，尽管问，尽管说！
t_en: If you have anything to say or ask, feel free to fire away!

t_ch: 我想问…
t_en: I'd like to ask...

t_ch: 它们知道你是它们的领导吗？
t_en: Do they know you're their leader?

t_ch: 这…这有点眼色的应该都感觉得到吧？
t_en: Well... Anyone with enough sense would know it, I guess.

t_ch: 阮•梅女士在为我挑选口味的时候，选了许久，最后加了大量的野心与自信，这才造就了我，其他人哪里比得上我啊？
t_en: Miss Ruan Mei spent a long time deciding on my recipe. In the end, she added lots of ambition and self-confidence to me. I'm superior to everyone else!

t_ch: 你的「管理规划」？
t_en: Your management plan?

t_ch: 嗯嗯，等我把所有造物收拢在一起，我就让大家每天写信给阮•梅女士，每封信都是夸我的，这样她就会知道我有多优秀了。
t_en: Wait till I gather all the creations. I'll get everyone to write letters to Miss Ruan Mei every day. Every letter is to include compliments for me so that Miss Ruan Mei will know how excellent I am.

t_ch: 到时候，说不定她会想，居然有这么一个天纵奇才在此蹉跎，然后就跑回来带我一起走，再精心教导我……
t_en: When the time comes, she'll probably wonder why such an extraordinary talent like me is wasting my time here. Then, she'll take me with her and give me her guidance...

t_ch: 当然，大家的恩情我也不会忘，到时候我也会替聪明的小家伙在阮•梅女士面前美言几句的。
t_en: Of course, I'm not an ungrateful rat. I'll put in a good word for the smart ones with Miss Ruan Mei.

t_ch: 你到底在守望些什么？
t_en: What exactly are you watching for?

t_ch: 嗯，我在此守望，直到阮•梅女士回来…她是我们的造物主，我们一直在等待她的归来……
t_en: Well, I'll watch this place until the return of Miss Ruan Mei... She's our creator, and I'll keep waiting for her to come back...

t_ch: 我没什么想问的了。
t_en: I have no more questions.

t_ch: 没关系，以后再聊呗。
t_en: No problem. Let's do this again next time.

t_ch: 我没什么想问的了。
t_en: I have no more questions.

t_ch: 噢，好的。
t_en: Oh, sure.

t_ch: 阮•梅女士的造物虽多，但大家既然聚在一起，共同成长，平日分工合作，总得有管理者——如你所见，鄙人正是，记住了吗？
t_en: Miss Ruan Mei has many creations. Since we're staying, growing, and working together, there has to be someone in charge. As you can see, I have stepped up to be one. Is that understandable?

t_ch: 我可跟那些不懂事的小家伙不一样，主要是身份上有一定差距。
t_en: I'm not like those ignorant brats outside, mainly because we have different statuses.

t_ch: 外面乱哄哄的，危机四伏！这里就不一样了，你是不是觉得这里很安全？
t_en: It's chaotic and dangerous outside. Here, it's different. You feel safe here, don't you?

t_ch: 这就对了，当时我就是在这里七进七出，将那些虫子打得落花流水，才换来这里的安宁！
t_en: That's how you're supposed to feel. I once came in and out of here seven times to defeat the bugs in return for the peace here!

t_ch: 你身手还挺好的。
t_en: You're quite a good fighter.

t_ch: 没办法，我生来如此。当然，这要感谢我的「母亲」——亲手创造出我这个生命体的，伟大的阮•梅女士！
t_en: I was born that way, and I owe that to my mother, the great Miss Ruan Mei who created me.

t_ch: 你够得着它们吗？
t_en: Can you reach them?

t_ch: 你这话什么意思？我可是尊贵的阮•梅女士亲手创造的生命，爪子长短和实力并没有直接关系，我的反应速度和隐藏实力说出来我都怕吓着你。
t_en: What do you mean? I'm a life created by the honorable Miss Ruan Mei, and the size of my paws has nothing to do with my capabilities. If you know my reaction speed and hidden talents, you'll be blown away.

t_ch: 你是外来者，你没听说过我的鼎鼎大名吗？…倒也正常。
t_en: Haven't you heard of me? ...I guess it's reasonable since you're an outsider.

t_ch: 没关系，现在我给你一个认识我的机会，你有什么想问的尽管问！
t_en: No worries. Now, I'll give you the chance to get to know me. You can ask me anything!

t_ch: 外面乱哄哄的，危机四伏！这里就不一样了，你是不是觉得这里很安全？
t_en: It's chaotic and dangerous outside. Here, it's different. You feel safe here, don't you?

t_ch: 这就对了，当时我就是在这里七进七出，将那些虫子打得落花流水，才换来这里的安宁！
t_en: That's how you're supposed to feel. I once came in and out of here seven times to defeat the bugs in return for the peace here!

t_ch: 又是你啊，你是来寻求本大人的庇护的吗，还是有别的什么事？
t_en: It's you again. Are you here to seek for my protection, or is it something else?

t_ch: 我想问…
t_en: I'd like to ask...

t_ch: 你的名字怎么这么奇怪？
t_en: How come you have such an unusual name?

t_ch: 这是大家给我起的绰号，不是我的本名，我的本名只有阮•梅女士知道，也只有阮•梅女士才能喊。
t_en: It's the nickname everyone gave me, not my real name, which is only known to Miss Ruan Mei. Only she can call me by that.

t_ch: 你真的和怪物战斗过吗？
t_en: Have you really fought against monsters?

t_ch: 这一层的怪物可多了，有到处乱飞的虫子，还有「悬浮呆呆怪」和「约瑟夫的幽灵」。
t_en: There are plenty of monsters here, such as the flying bugs, the Levitating Fool, and Joseph's Spirit.

t_ch: 嚯嚯！在我的威名之下，它们都不敢直视我，我都不用亲自出手就能把它们吓唬走！
t_en: Bahaha! They're intimidated by my reputation and dare not even look me in the eye! I can get rid of them without lifting a finger!

t_ch: （向它炫耀你的冒险故事）
t_en: (Tell it the stories of your adventure to show off)

t_ch: 你向它讲述了你跟随星穹列车，穿梭在空间站与其他地方的冒险经历。
t_en: You share with it how you travel to space stations and other places by riding the Astral Express.

t_ch: 小家伙一开始还听得津津有味，可没过多久，便被你娓娓道来的惊险故事吓得抱住了头，缩在你脚边瑟瑟发抖。
t_en: The little guy enjoys the story at first but is soon left aghast by your thrilling tales. It clutches its head and cowers next to your feet, trembling in fear.

t_ch: …好、好了……
t_en: ...I—I think I've heard enough.

t_ch: 你不要再说了，我承认你也很厉害。你一定跟我一样，身体里有很多「勇气」的添加剂。
t_en: Say no more, and I recognize that you're pretty amazing too. You must have a generous dose of courage in your system, just like me.

t_ch: 我没什么想问的了。
t_en: I have no more questions.

t_ch: 好吧！
t_en: Alright!

t_ch: 我没什么想问的了。
t_en: I have no more questions.

t_ch: 好吧！
t_en: Alright!

t_ch: 你一定是被我骁勇善战的气息吓到了！这也正常！
t_en: You must find my gallant vibe pretty daunting, which is normal!

t_ch: 嚯嚯，以前就有过这种事，那——么——大的怪物，看起来多厉害，结果还不是见到我就跑！
t_en: This isn't the first time something like this has happened. Back then, there was a monster THIS huge! It seemed intimidating, but it scuttled off the moment it saw me!

t_ch: 大家一定要重视，要警惕，千万要小心那些「豆沙灰灰」手下的坏东西！
t_en: Guys, please be very, very careful of those thugs under Gray Bean Paste. We need to take them seriously.

t_ch: 啊，是你！我记得你，就是你将我送到那个可恶的传送装置里的，害我脸着地，疼了好久！
t_en: Ah, it's you! It was you who sent me to that wicked teleporter! Because of you, I landed on my face and suffered for a long time!

t_ch: 真的吗，我完全没印象了。
t_en: I did? I can't remember anything.

t_ch: 可恶，你不记得我啦？你连尊贵的芝士流心大人都忘了？
t_en: I can't believe you don't remember me! Have you forgotten about Lord Molten Cheese Tart too?

t_ch: 你这个坏东西，你怎么能这样！
t_en: You're a bad guy! How can you do this to us!?

t_ch: 对不起，怪我下手没轻重。
t_en: I'm sorry for being too rough on you guys.

t_ch: 哇咔咔，你给我道歉了，我还真没想到你会放下你高贵的身段来跟我道歉！
t_en: Mwahaha, you just apologized to me! I didn't expect your noble self would be willing to do that!

t_ch: 毕竟你是…你是阮•梅女士的助理，哦不对，助手，是这个词吧？
t_en: After all, you're Miss Ruan Mei's assistant — or should I say "deputy"?

t_ch: 既然你都道歉了，那我就原谅你啦！
t_en: Since you've apologized, I'll forgive you!

t_ch: 哇咔咔，没想到会在这里见到你，对了，我有个小秘密要告诉你，你不许跟别的坏点心说——
t_en: Mwahaha, what a surprise to see you here! By the way, I have a little secret to share with you. Don't tell the other bad snacks...

t_ch: 以后别在大家面前喊我「芝士流心」了，就算是喊我「尊贵的芝士流心大人」也不行。
t_en: Please stop addressing me as "Molten Cheese Tart" in public, not even "Honorable Lord Molten Cheese Tart".

t_ch: 我现在是沉稳睿智的「洞悉者」，这是我的最新外号，以后就喊我「洞悉者大人」或者「睿智的洞悉者大人」吧！
t_en: Now, I'm called the "Insighter," I am one who is wise and well-composed. Please call me "Lord Insighter" or "The Wise Lord Insighter" in the future!

t_ch: 本天才早已洞悉了这个舱段的一切秘密，现在正在无偿为大家提供生活上的咨询服务。你要是遇到什么麻烦，也可以来问我！
t_en: As a genius, I've figured out all the secrets in this zone, and I'm offering free life advice to everyone. If you run into any trouble, you can come to me!

t_ch: 大家一定要重视，要警惕，千万要小心那些「豆沙灰灰」手下的坏东西！
t_en: Guys, please be very, very careful of those thugs under Gray Bean Paste. We need to take them seriously.

t_ch: 本天才早已洞悉了这个舱段的一切秘密，现在正在无偿为大家提供生活上的咨询服务。你要是遇到什么麻烦，也可以来问我！
t_en: As a genius, I've figured out all the secrets in this zone, and I'm offering free life advice to everyone. If you run into any trouble, you can come to me!

t_ch: 我想问…
t_en: I'd like to ask...

t_ch: 你和豆沙灰灰是敌是友？
t_en: Are you a friend or a foe of Gray Bean Paste?

t_ch: 我跟那个成天低气压只知道哭的家伙才不是朋友！你不要明知故问！
t_en: I'm no friend of that loser who's always crying and full of negativity! Don't ask something with such an obvious answer!

t_ch: 它这么消极，怎么会得到阮•梅的肯定？让它把消极的气味传递给其他造物，这样可不好！
t_en: How is it supposed to gain Ruan Mei's recognition with all that negativity? We don't want it to spread its pessimism to other creations!

t_ch: 怎么突然就改头换姓了？
t_en: Why the sudden name change?

t_ch: 芝士流心，不，现在是洞悉者，它眼神坚定地望着你。
t_en: Molten Cheese Tart— nope, the one who identifies as Insighter, looks at you with a firm gaze.

t_ch: 是你教导我要谦虚一点，你不记得了吗？
t_en: You taught me to be humble. Don't you remember that?

t_ch: 阮•梅很欣赏你，所以你的话，我会听的，我想要跟你一样！
t_en: Ruan Mei admires you, so I'll listen to your advice and be someone like you!

t_ch: 可是「芝士流心」给大家留下的刻板印象已经无法改变，即使是本天才也没有办法改变！哇咔咔，那干脆就换个名字重新开始吧！
t_en: The impression "Molten Cheese Tart" has left on everyone is set too deep to be changed, not even by a genius like me! So, I decided to get a new name and start afresh!

t_ch: 只要我的改变足够明显，阮•梅一定会被我的付出所打动的！
t_en: As long as my changes are significant enough, Ruan Mei will definitely be moved by my effort!

t_ch: 你在这儿做什么？
t_en: What are you doing here?

t_ch: 哇咔咔，我敢说没有人比我更了解阮•梅！可惜我的同族大多都很笨，它们不清楚阮•梅究竟喜欢什么、会被什么所吸引。
t_en: Mwahaha, I bet no one knows Ruan Mei better than I! It's a shame that most of my peers are too dumb to discern what Ruan Mei likes and gravitates to.

t_ch: 所以本天才接过了这个重任——我要来指导大家来赢取阮•梅的认可！
t_en: So, I have to shoulder the responsibility by showing everyone the way to win over Ruan Mei's favor!

t_ch: 我没什么想问的了。
t_en: I have no more questions.

t_ch: 你可不要不懂装懂哦，有什么不懂的及时问我！
t_en: Just ask me if you're unsure of something. Don't be a know-it-all.

t_ch: 我没什么想问的了。
t_en: I have no more questions.

t_ch: 行吧！以后再聊。
t_en: Alright! Catch you later.

t_ch: 哇咔咔，以本天才的智慧与远见！得到阮•梅女士的认可只是迟早的事！
t_en: Mwahaha, it's just a matter of time for me to gain Miss Ruan Mei's recognition with my knowledge and vision!

t_ch: 我看到了通往空间站其他舱段的路，不过，这里是要怎么上去呢？
t_en: I see the way to the space station, but how do I get there?

t_ch: 噢，你好，没想到能在这里遇到大活人，这还是头一遭。
t_en: Oh, hello. This is my first time running into a human here.

t_ch: 听到我说话，你好像很惊讶？
t_en: You seem surprised to hear me speak.

t_ch: 为什么你会说人话？
t_en: How come you can speak human language?

t_ch: 你既然已经见过阮•梅创造的生命体，那想必也能感受到，在她无穷尽的智慧之下，我们无法确定哪些是绝对的规则。
t_en: After meeting some of Ruan Mei's creations, you should have realized there are no definite rules as to how Ruan Mei uses her boundless intellect.

t_ch: 或许，生命体之间沟通的形式远比我们所想象到的更多元，我会说你们的语言也不是什么奇怪之事。
t_en: Perhaps, the ways different life forms communicate with each other are far more diverse than we can imagine. So, it's not much of a surprise that I can speak your language.

t_ch: 你的声音有点特别。
t_en: Your voice is quite special.

t_ch: 哈哈，谢谢你的夸奖，阮•梅创造了我，她赋予我独特的生存方式与思维模式，或许就是这些东西，塑造出了我这副嗓子吧。
t_en: Haha, thanks for your compliment. Ruan Mei created me and granted me a unique way of surviving and thinking. Maybe it's those things that shape my voice.

t_ch: 这个舱段，空间站的人叫它「禁闭舱段」。我在小机器人那里查询到了相关的记录。
t_en: This is called the seclusion zone on the space station, right? I found related records from the little robot.

t_ch: 我在你身上感受到了阮•梅的气息，你们先前想来是有过接触。或许你比我更熟悉这个舱段，但我独自求索许久，也有一些心得。
t_en: I can feel Ruan Mei's aura on you, so I suppose you two have met before. You're probably more familiar with this zone than I am, but I've also learned a thing or two after exploring alone for a long time.

t_ch: 你要是感兴趣，或者有什么想问的，我会尽量回答你。
t_en: If you're interested or have any questions, I'll do my best to answer them.

t_ch: 我看到了通往空间站其他舱段的路，不过，这里是要怎么上去呢？
t_en: I see the way to the space station, but how do I get there?

t_ch: 噢，你好，又见面了。我在这里独自求索许久，也有一些心得。
t_en: Hey, here we are again. I've learned a thing or two after exploring this place alone for a long time.

t_ch: 你要是感兴趣，或者有什么想问的，我会尽量回答你。
t_en: If you're interested or have any questions, I'll do my best to answer them.

t_ch: 我想问…
t_en: I'd like to ask...

t_ch: 需要我带你去其他舱段吗？
t_en: Do you need my help getting to other zones?

t_ch: 我知道怎么去其他舱段，是通过那个叫「电梯」的东西，还是那个「接驳车」来着？
t_en: I know how to go. I have to take something called an "elevator" or "shuttle," right?

t_ch: 你的好意我心领了，生命中有些路必须独自行走，这样才能找到我想要的答案。
t_en: Thanks for your kind offer, but some paths are meant to be taken alone. That's how I can find the answer I'm looking for.

t_ch: 你是在寻找阮•梅吗？
t_en: Are you looking for Ruan Mei?

t_ch: 是的。不过我这样做，其实是在故意绕远路。在找到她之前，我想先行探索生命的奥秘，还有——
t_en: Yes. Actually, I've been taking the scenic route, in the hopes that I'll uncover the secrets of life before meeting her. Also...

t_ch: 宇宙如此广阔，我在寻找自己的位置。
t_en: I'd like to find where I belong in this vast universe.

t_ch: 我很好奇你是什么口味的？
t_en: I'm very curious what you taste like?

t_ch: 发酵过的面团，放了些许椒盐，因此产生了一些质变。
t_en: I'm fermented dough sprinkled with some pepper and salt to develop into a different texture.

t_ch: 它对你眨了眨眼，话语里似乎别有深意。
t_en: It gives you a wink, and what it says seems to be hinting at something.

t_ch: 有什么有趣的事吗？
t_en: Is there anything interesting going on?

t_ch: 你可以去找我的同族聊聊，我们同为阮•梅的造物，它们对自己的认知在你们看来或许会很有趣。
t_en: I suggest you have a chat with my peers. Just like me, they are Ruan Mei's creations, and their perception of themselves may sound intriguing to you.

t_ch: 我没什么想问的了。
t_en: I have no more questions.

t_ch: 有缘再见。
t_en: Until we meet again.

t_ch: 我没什么想问的了。
t_en: I have no more questions.

t_ch: 有缘的时候再见吧，希望那时候我已经能找到自己的答案了。
t_en: Until we meet again. I hope I'll have already found my answer by then.

t_ch: 我将独自探索，直至拨开头顶的迷雾……
t_en: I will explore alone until the fog has lifted from my head...

t_ch: 呜…呜呜？呜呜呜？
t_en: Woo... Woo-woo? Wubba-woo?

t_ch: 你听不懂呜呜伯在说什么，还是去请教下懂行的科员吧？
t_en: You don't have a clue what Wubbaboo is saying. You should probably seek help from a researcher who can understand it.

t_ch: 听说界种科的阿德勒似乎和呜呜伯走得很近……
t_en: Adler from the Department of Ecology is said to be close with Wubbaboo...

t_ch: 你好，呜呜？是{NICKNAME}{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}！
t_en: Hello, Wubbie? It's {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 你在这干什么？
t_en: What are you doing here?

t_ch: 下来…呜呜…玩！
t_en: Get down here... Wubbie... Play!

t_ch: 你认得我？
t_en: You recognize me?

t_ch: 呜呜认得！空间站！英雄！呜呜的！英雄！
t_en: Yes, I do! Space station! Hero! My hero!

t_ch: {F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}呜？一起玩呜？
t_en: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, woo? Play with me, woo?

t_ch: 呜呜在这，很熟呜！
t_en: I'm here! Very familiar, woo!

t_ch: {F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}呜？一起玩呜？
t_en: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, woo? Play with me, woo?

t_ch: 呜呜在这，很熟呜！
t_en: I'm here! Very familiar, woo!

t_ch: 我想问…
t_en: I'd like to ask...

t_ch: 你怎么就当别人模特了？
t_en: How did you end up becoming someone else's model?

t_ch: 下来玩呜，约瑟夫喊的呜呜…呜呜答应了。
t_en: Joseph said, woo, get down and play, boo... and I said yes.

t_ch: 大家想让呜呜，呜呜放东西，东西放呜呜身上，呜呜答应了！
t_en: Everyone wanted to woowoo, put things on woo me. Woo, I said yes!

t_ch: 你是从哪儿溜进来的？
t_en: Where did you sneak in from?

t_ch: 接驳车呜…呜呜在彻底…卡在缝里了，疼死了呜。
t_en: Shuttle, woo... I got stuck in a gap under the shuttle. It hurt a lot, woo.

t_ch: 这里很危险，还是回去吧。
t_en: It's dangerous here. You should go back.

t_ch: 呜呜不，呜呜想玩，呜呜不想回去。
t_en: I want to play here. I don't want to go back.

t_ch: 我没什么想问的了。
t_en: I have no more questions.

t_ch: 呜！
t_en: Woo!

t_ch: 我没什么想问的了。
t_en: I have no more questions.

t_ch: 呜！
t_en: Woo!

t_ch: 一起玩？下次，呜呜？呜呜呜！
t_en: Play with me? Next time, woo-woo? Wubba-woo!

t_ch: 远程信号正常，检测到视野内有生命迹象。
t_en: Remote signals normal. Signs of life detected within the field of vision.

t_ch: 正在识别…识别中…识别成功，是否接受通话邀请？
t_en: Identification in progress... Identification successful. Accept call request?

t_ch: 打给我的？我接！
t_en: A call for me? I'll take it!

t_ch: 连接中……
t_en: Connecting...

t_ch: 我可以拒绝吗？
t_en: Can I reject it?

t_ch: 正在查询，{NICKNAME}科员是否具备权限。
t_en: Checking permissions for researcher {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 查询中…找不到所需权限，无法执行该操作。
t_en: Checking permissions... Permission for this action not found.

t_ch: 远程通话已开启，远程信号正常。
t_en: Remote call started. Remote signals normal.

t_ch: 有孩童的惊呼声从小机器人身上传出，你注意到这声音似乎有点耳熟。
t_en: A child's exclamation comes from the little robot, and the voice sounds a little familiar to you.

t_ch: 喂！
t_en: Hello!

t_ch: 是{NICKNAME}吗？我正在远程观察这里的珍稀物种呢，没想到能见到你……
t_en: Is it {NICKNAME}? I'm remotely observing the rare species here. It's a surprise to see you...

t_ch: 远程信号正常，检测到视野内有生命迹象。
t_en: Remote signals normal. Signs of life detected within the field of vision.

t_ch: 远程通话已开启，远程信号正常。
t_en: Remote call started. Remote signals normal.

t_ch: 喂！没想到又见到你了……
t_en: Hello! I didn't expect to see you again...

t_ch: 我想问…
t_en: I want to ask you something...

t_ch: 你哪位？
t_en: Who are you?

t_ch: 我是阿德勒啊，界种科的科员。我们先前不是打过交道吗，你没认出来？
t_en: I'm Adler, a researcher from the Department of Ecology. Haven't we met each other before? Don't you recognize me?

t_ch: 算了…你说话也有点噪音，可能是你那边信号不好，没认出我也正常……
t_en: Never mind... Your voice is a bit distorted, probably because of poor signals on your side. That might be why you can't recognize me...

t_ch: 现在究竟是什么情况？
t_en: What exactly is happening over there now?

t_ch: 没什么，就是界种科最近有新项目，说是在空间站发现了一种神奇的小生命。
t_en: Nothing much, just a new project going on at the Department of Ecology. Apparently a mysterious little life form was discovered at the space station.

t_ch: 我负责用小机器人远程实时监控它们，记录一下收集到的数据、它们的行为表现什么的…听起来有点枯燥，不过我感觉还蛮有意思的。
t_en: I'm in charge of monitoring these creatures remotely with a little robot and recording the collected data and their behavior... It sounds a bit dull, but I find it pretty interesting.

t_ch: 你得出什么结论了吗？
t_en: Have you reached any conclusions yet?

t_ch: 啊！当然！我可是阿德勒！你不要把我和界种科某些办不成事的大人相提并论。
t_en: You bet! I'm Adler, you know? Don't put me in the same category as the incompetent nincompoops at the Department of Ecology.

t_ch: 我发现这批珍稀物种之间应该有接近于人类的复杂情感，它们之间的想法甚至会出现相互矛盾的情况。
t_en: I noticed that these rare creatures exhibit complicated emotions akin to the ones in humans. Sometimes, their thoughts can even contradict each other.

t_ch: 比如说，有的很讨厌小机器人，也很讨厌工作，只知道睡懒觉，还给小机器人乱取外号排斥人家。但有的又很喜欢小机器人，还会主动维修……
t_en: For instance, some of them dislike the little robot, are reluctant to work, spend their days napping, and bully the little robot by giving it nasty nicknames. Meanwhile, some are fond of the little robot and even take the initiative to repair it...

t_ch: 我还不确定，这是否能证明它们有和人类相似的大脑分区与思考模式…总之还是要继续观察下去。
